title: [BUG] Error with Angular 10 and ExcelJS 4.1.1
author: titideb
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report
Error on compilation with Angular 10
"export 'Workbook' (imported as 'ExcelJS') was not found in 'exceljs'

Lib version: 4.1.1

## Steps To Reproduce
```javascript
const workbook = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
const worksheet = workbook.addWorksheet('Main sheet');
```
Run command ng build and error occured
## The expected behaviour:

Angular compilation will be success

comments.author: anthwri
comments.body:
I posted about this a month ago on stack overflow, and got one comment, no answers. A pity.
[https://stackoverflow.com/questions/62674329/upgrading-to-angular-10-breaks-exceljs](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/62674329/upgrading-to-angular-10-breaks-exceljs)
